description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the image registry.gitlab.com/haboustak/glartifacts/build-env:1.2 with two stages: build and test. In the build stage add a build job that runs python setup.py sdist bdist_wheel and stores the resulting dist/ directory as an artifact. In the test stage add a test job that runs pylint glartifacts --ignore proto -j 8 and then executes su -c "python -m unittest -v" postgres to run the unit tests as the postgres user. No caches, services, or conditional rules are defined.
